description: Write a Python script to calculate the geodetic back-azimuth from station GE.TOLI to the 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake and rotate the station's horizontal seismogram components (BHN, BHE) into Radial (R) and Transverse (T) components. The script should extract coordinates and waveform data from the SeisComP database and SDS archive. Save the script to ~/rotate_waveforms.py, the calculated back-azimuth value to ~/baz_toli.txt, and a plot containing four subplots (North, East, Radial, Transverse) to ~/rotation_plot.png. You may use standard SeisComP Python APIs or install necessary packages like obspy or matplotlib.
